_meta.urlPattern: /api/img/v-matrix/{id}/icon.png (boost cores: composited split of iconSkills; special cores: own icon)

10000000.name: Rope Lift
10000000.desc: Fires a grappling hook to a platform above you to ascend quickly.

10000001.name: Decent Mystic Door
10000001.desc: Create a portal to the nearest town.

10000002.name: Decent Sharp Eyes
10000002.desc: Locates an enemy's weak spot to deal lethal damage.

10000003.name: Decent Hyper Body
10000003.desc: Increases Max HP and Max MP.

10000004.name: Decent Combat Orders
10000004.desc: Temporarily increases all of your skill levels. Further raises 4th job skills that are already at master level. Other skills can only be increased to master level.

10000005.name: Decent Advanced Blessing
10000005.desc: Increase ATT, Magic ATT, Defense, Max HP, and Max MP. \nOnly the highest effect from Bless, Advanced Blessing, or Decent Advanced Blessing will be applied.

10000006.name: Decent Speed Infusion
10000006.desc: Increase your attack speed by 1. Only the highest effect from either Speed Infusion or Decent Speed Infusion will be applied.

10000007.name: Blink
10000007.desc: Teleport to a random location on the map.

10000008.name: Erda Nova
10000008.desc: Gather Erda from yourself and your surroundings to explode enemies. Disrupts the Erda of your targets, binding their movements.

10000009.name: Will of Erda
10000009.desc: Hones your resolve to ignore certain abnormal status effects. Immune to most abnormal status effects for 3 sec after use. Certain abnormal status effects will still get through.

10000010.name: Decent Holy Symbol
10000010.desc: Temporarily gain extra EXP and items when hunting enemies. Does not stack with Holy Symbol.

10000011.name: Blitz Shield
10000011.desc: Harnesses your own Lifeforce to create a protective shield. You can detonate this shield to inflict damage to nearby enemies.

10000012.name: Arcane Overdrive
10000012.desc: Reforges the lost secrets of the ancients to drive your magic to new heights. However, the incomplete replication of their techniques causes the power to gradually dissipate.

10000013.name: Fury of the Wild
10000013.desc: Temporarily infuses Phoenix, Frostprey, and Shadow Raven with mysterious power for a devastating attack. Can only be used when either Phoenix, Frostprey, or Shadow Raven are summoned.

10000014.name: Shadow Walker
10000014.desc: Your stealth abilities have been heightened to their limit, allowing you to attack and use skills for a short period without breaking stealth. Shadow Walker's stealth effect is not broken by attacks or skills. Attack is increased while stealthed.

10000015.name: Pirate's Banner
10000015.desc: Hoists high the banner of the brave pirate, bolstering party morale and driving fear into the hearts of your enemies.

10000016.name: Phalanx Charge
10000016.desc: Summons brave Spearmen of the Cygnus Knights to charge enemies in a phalanx formation. Press the skill key again to change their direction of movement.

10000017.name: Freud's Wisdom
10000017.desc: Even in the darkest times, Freud could be relied upon for his wisdom. Call upon Freud's wisdom to steel your resolve and enhance your combat prowess.

10000018.name: Defender of the Demon
10000018.desc: Summons Mastema to fight by your side.

10000019.name: Resistance Infantry
10000019.desc: Summons a squad of Resistance infantry to blast the enemy with long-ranged attacks.

10000022.name: Erda Shower
10000022.desc: Fires a blast of compressed Erdas at nearby enemies.

10000020.name: Might of the Nova
10000020.desc: Calls upon the deities of the Nova for the power to punish your enemies. Might of the Nova does not stack with Heaven's Door, and Heaven's Door takes precedence.

10000023.name: Conversion Overdrive
10000023.desc: Activates and amplifies the power in magic wings to max out Magic Conversion.

10000024.name: True Arachnid Reflection
10000024.desc: The collapsing space between the Mirror World and reality become linked with Will's Erda, causing the spider within the mirror to temporarily materialize in reality.

10000025.name: Maple World Goddess's Blessing
10000025.desc: The Maple World Goddess's Blessing increases all stats and damage.

10000026.name: Empress Cygnus's Blessing
10000026.desc: The blessing of Cygnus increases damage and continuously restores HP over time. This skill can be enhanced after Lv. 245.

10000027.name: Transcendent Rhinne's Prayer
10000027.desc: The prayers of Rhinne, the Transcendent of Time, grant a new ability.

10000028.name: Grandis Goddess's Blessing
10000028.desc: The goddess of Grandis has a different appearance for each of her child races, and she grants a different blessing to each race.

10000029.name: Otherworld Goddess's Blessing
10000029.desc: The goddess of the otherworld does whatever she wants and periodically gives a blessing of a different type.

10000031.name: Solar Crest
10000031.desc: Mitra's power manifests the searing heat of the sun as a blazing inferno.

10000032.name: Lotus Flower
10000032.desc: Summon an auspicious lotus flower from the realm of the sages.

10000033.name: Afterimage of the Otherworld
10000033.desc: Opens a portal that reflects the image of another world.

10000034.name: Transcendent
10000034.desc: Receives the blessing of the Transcendent of Light, Life, and Time.

10000036.name: Decent Holy Fountain
10000036.desc: Summon a Holy Fountain that restores party members' HP.

10010000.name: Weapon Aura
10010000.desc: Infuses your weapon with a portion of your health,  granting it a visible aura and temporarily empowering it.

10010025.name: Impenetrable Skin
10010025.desc: Makes your flesh as strong as steel so you're not pushed back by enemy attacks.

10010001.name: Burning Soul Blade
10010001.desc: Conjures a burning soul blade to fight at your side.

10010002.name: Divine Echo
10010002.desc: Grants an echo of your battle prowess to a party member.

10010003.name: Spear of Darkness
10010003.desc: Hurls a spear of utter darkness at the enemy.

10010004.name: Cosmos
10010004.desc: Unleash a swirl of galaxies around you.

10010006.name: Demonic Frenzy
10010006.desc: Sacrifice your body to the flames to fuel your vengeance.

10010007.name: Shield of Light
10010007.desc: Become the shield that protects party members from enemy attacks.

10010008.name: Nova Guardians
10010008.desc: Summons the Kaisers of old to fight by your side.

10010009.name: Chrono Break
10010009.desc: Freezes time, breaking through the limits of reality itself.

10010010.name: Finisher - Adrenaline Surge
10010010.desc: Release a rush of freezing energy alongside Maha's to create a giant blizzard that attacks enemies.

10010011.name: Rocket Punch
10010011.desc: Load up your Arm Cannon with armor-piercing ammo, and deliver an earth-shattering punch.

10010013.name: Worldreaver
10010013.desc: Unleashes a brutal slash that decimates all in sight.

10010014.name: Hammers of the Righteous
10010014.desc: Summons a whirling bulwark of righteous hammers to strike down nearby enemies.

10010015.name: Radiant Evil
10010015.desc: Evil Eye reveals itself and blasts nearby enemies.

10010016.name: Sword of Light
10010016.desc: Focuses the power of your Soul Shield into the form of the legendary Sword of Light to strike down your foes.

10010017.name: Rift of Damnation
10010017.desc: Creates a rift between the world of the living and the Underworld when used with Styx Crossing.

10010018.name: Maha's Carnage
10010018.desc: Swings Maha around in a circle, leaving a trail of destruction in its wake.

10010019.name: Spirit of Rage
10010019.desc: Sacrifice all your Fury to conjure a malevolent serpent of pure rage.

10010020.name: Demonic Blast
10010020.desc: Sacrifice your own health to release an explosion of demonic energy. Can be used while the skill is active. If you defeat an enemy or strike a boss with this ability, you will recover HP, ignoring Demonic Frenzy's recovery reduction.

10010021.name: Gatling Punch
10010021.desc: Throws a rapid barrage of punches out in front of you.

10010022.name: Bladefall
10010022.desc: Your Tempest Blades rain down upon the enemy, oozing deadly magma where they land to incinerate enemies.

10010023.name: Twin Blades of Time
10010023.desc: Alpha and Beta attack together to demolish the enemy.

10010026.name: Instinctual Combo
10010026.desc: Tap into your subconscious abilities and use your power to its fullest potential.

10010027.name: Grand Guardian
10010027.desc: A glorious cross-section of light blazes, symbolizing noble sacrifice.

10010028.name: Calamitous Cyclone
10010028.desc: Swing a spear so fast you create a dark storm and wipe out the area in front of you.

10010029.name: Radiant Soul
10010029.desc: Draw on your soul power and imbue your sword with a radiant light.

10010030.name: Soul Eclipse
10010030.desc: Focus your wisdom and the strength of your soul to call forth a stunning eclipse.

10010031.name: Final Beyond Blade - White Tiger
10010031.desc: Complete Beyond Blade by channeling all of Maha's power into the polearm.

10010032.name: Orthrus
10010032.desc: Sacrifice all your Fury to summon a malevolent twin god of pure rage.

10010033.name: Dimensional Sword
10010033.desc: Amplify the Desperado's power and call forth a brilliant sword of destruction.

10010034.name: Bullet Blast
10010034.desc: Use the Revolver Gauntlet to unleash the combined power of all of your bullets in one concussive blast.

10010035.name: Draco Surge
10010035.desc: Enhance Gigas Wave with the strength of an ancient dragon.

10010036.name: Shadow Flash
10010036.desc: Drive swords into the earth to create a personal sanctuary, then teleport back in time to inflict a devastating attack.

10010038.name: Ruin
10010038.desc: Summons the ancient sword of destruction to cause a massive collapse.

10010039.name: Infinity Blade
10010039.desc: Creates a space filled with countless aether swords.

10010040.name: Legacy Restoration
10010040.desc: Temporarily restores the lost magical conduit, and the enchanted wings of the past.

10010041.name: Sword Illusion
10010041.desc: Slice forward faster than the eye can see.

10010042.name: Mighty Mjolnir
10010042.desc: Summon the hammer of an ancient god, then hurl it straight toward your enemies.

10010043.name: Darkness Aura
10010043.desc: Unleash an aura of darkness that boosts your combat instincts and steals the life force from nearby enemies.

10010044.name: Light of Courage
10010044.desc: Inspire your allies and scorch your enemies with the light of unfailing courage.

10010045.name: Flare Slash
10010045.desc: Unleash an explosive eruption of forged Spiritual Resin.

10010046.name: Blizzard Tempest
10010046.desc: Create a blizzard that calls down the Dire Wolf's Curse.

10010048.name: Revenant
10010048.desc: Your unceasing rage warps you into a specter, wavering between life and death.

10010049.name: Afterimage Shock
10010049.desc: A powerful attack creates afterimage-like shockwaves, which sweep through enemies.

10010050.name: Dragonflare
10010050.desc: Call forth an ancient dragon god, and with it flame incarnate.

10010051.name: Ego Weapon
10010051.desc: Send your weapon to attack enemies with a will of its own.

10010052.name: Storm
10010052.desc: All aether swords commanded by Hunting Decree sweep around you in a wild current.

10010054.name: Final Plum Blossom Sword: Thousand Blossom Flurry
10010054.desc: Summons a plum blossom tree that spreads dancing petals across the battlefield, each as sharp as your peerless sword.

10010055.name: Soul Immeasurable
10010055.desc: Covers the battlefield with the full strength of Saya's unfettered power.

10010056.name: Final Plum Blossom Sword: Dancing Annihilation
10010056.desc: Annihilates the enemy with a sword dance of unsurpassable grace.

10010057.name: Final Imugi Spirit Sword: Blade of the Unbound Heart
10010057.desc: Moves your sword solely through the power of Saya's unbound heart--the heart of a dragon--and summons spirit blades that are fired in all directions.

10010060.name: Eternal Guardian
10010060.desc: Summons the Shining Sentinel Captain, materialized from divine power.

10010061.name: Destruction of Roan
10010061.desc: Attacks with an explosive burst of light.

10020000.name: Mana Overload
10020000.desc: Increases your attack skills by overloading the mana flowing through you.

10020001.name: DoT Punisher
10020001.desc: Summons flame orbs from another dimension to pursue enemies.

10020002.name: Frost Ark
10020002.desc: Manifest the very essence of ice and lightning into a magical structure.

10020003.name: Benediction
10020003.desc: Calls upon your holy power to create a consecrated space that empowers and revitalizes your allies.

10020004.name: Gate of Light
10020004.desc: Summons a gate to a realm of pure light whose blinding glow incinerates nearby. Unaffected by attack reflection.

10020005.name: Aura Scythe
10020005.desc: Combine all of your auras and become a grim specter of death.

10020006.name: Psychic Tornado
10020006.desc: Unleashes your psychic powers to create a tornado that draws in nearby objects.

10020007.name: Elemental Barrage
10020007.desc: Utilizes powerful elemental magic to unleash a torrent of attacks.

10020008.name: Orbital Inferno
10020008.desc: Hurls a giant ball of flame that shoots forward before returning to you.

10020011.name: Poison Nova
10020011.desc: Releases a poisonous cloud that spreads in all directions, striking nearby enemies. You can detonate the cloud to inflict additional damage.

10020012.name: Bolt Barrage
10020012.desc: Summons a wall of lightning that pulses forward, electrocuting enemies in its path.

10020013.name: Angel of Balance
10020013.desc: Summons an angel of balance possessing both compassion and vengefulness.

10020014.name: Savage Flame
10020014.desc: Unleashes the true might of the Essence of Fire.

10020015.name: Dragon Slam
10020015.desc: Mir slams down and savagely attacks the enemy.

10020016.name: Aether Conduit
10020016.desc: Attack enemies in front of you by summoning a magic circle that resonates with light and darkness.

10020017.name: Altar of Annihilation
10020017.desc: Summons an altar of destructive magic that expels curses.

10020018.name: Ultimate - Mind Over Matter
10020018.desc: Conjures ultra-dense matter out of pure psychic energy, and launches it toward the enemy.

10020021.name: Ethereal Form
10020021.desc: Move to a different dimension to become invincible. Use the skill again to return.

10020022.name: Crystal Ignition
10020022.desc: It radiates powerful energy that burns everything in its path. The skill can be maintained for a maximum of 10 seconds with the down key, while left and right movement is possible.

10020023.name: Templar Knight
10020023.desc: Summons a machine warrior that uses the New World's weapon, Gram. The Gramholder prepares to discharge in the direction of Illium, and does not change direction until it discharges. During preparation, if the Crystal Charge exceeds a certain amount, it can shoot more powerful sword energy.

10020024.name: Elemental Fury
10020024.desc: Unleash the fury of flame in the form of an enraged spirit.

10020025.name: Spirit of Snow
10020025.desc: Summon the devastating frosts of the El Nath Mountains.

10020026.name: Peacemaker
10020026.desc: Hurl the embodiment of divine power directly at your enemies.

10020027.name: Inferno Sphere
10020027.desc: Blaze through your enemies with the phoenix's symbol of infinite life and death.

10020028.name: Elemental Radiance
10020028.desc: Cast a magical ring to channel the power of the constellations.

10020029.name: Baptism of Light and Darkness
10020029.desc: Use the ultimate combination of light and dark to eviscerate your enemies.

10020030.name: Grim Harvest
10020030.desc: Master the art of black magic and summon death itself to deal with your enemies.

10020031.name: Ultimate - Psychic Shockwave
10020031.desc: Fuse monsters and objects into one and launch them like bullets.

10020032.name: Crystalline Spirit
10020032.desc: Use the power of mytocrystals to form a crystalline spirit and drive your enemies away.

10020035.name: Poison Chain
10020035.desc: Unleash a fatal poison on a chain of enemies.

10020036.name: Jupiter Thunder
10020036.desc: Launch orbs full of the thunder god's power directly at your enemies.

10020037.name: Divine Punishment
10020037.desc: Punish the wicked in the name of all that is holy.

10020038.name: Salamander Mischief
10020038.desc: Summon the fire of a playful salamander spirit.

10020039.name: Spiral of Mana
10020039.desc: Utilize the Mana Burst's pentacle to allow clusters of mana to swirl with the speed of a tornado on their own.

10020040.name: Liberation Orb
10020040.desc: Manifest orbs of both light and darkness.

10020041.name: Abyssal Lightning
10020041.desc: Immerse your surroundings in dark magic to gather up black lightning.

10020042.name: Law of Gravity
10020042.desc: Bring down enemies with immense gravitational forces.

10020043.name: Crystal Gate
10020043.desc: Using advanced crystal technology, create passages you can move through freely.

10020046.name: Big Stretch
10020046.desc: Awaken multiple dormant Dragon Veins within your surroundings, all at once.

10020047.name: Land's Connection
10020047.desc: Call every type of land spirit in Mother Nature's existence to frolic together.

10020048.name: Surging Essence
10020048.desc: Fill the earth's flowing essence with magic and make it bloom, causing a mountain land spirit to surge forth.

10020049.name: Winding Mountain Ridge
10020049.desc: Call eccentric mountain land spirits who love to run.

10020058.name: Psychic Shockwave
10020058.desc: Read the flow of particles and send out a pulse to rip through the flow.

10020059.name: Psychic Nova
10020059.desc: Summon a giant Otherworld object, then compress it until it explodes.

10020060.name: Ultimate: Checkmate
10020060.desc: Launch Otherworld objects at enemies from unpredictable angles.

10020061.name: Psychic Castle
10020061.desc: Dominate the enemy's mind to create a giant game of chess.

10030000.name: Guided Arrow
10030000.desc: Creates spirit arrows that pursue and attack nearby enemies.

10030011.name: Vicious Shot
10030011.desc: When inflicting a critical wound, your strike hits the enemy where they are most vulnerable, dealing greater damage.

10030001.name: Storm of Arrows
10030001.desc: Fires arrows into the sky to fall like rain.

10030002.name: Howling Gale
10030002.desc: Summons a ferocious gust to punish your enemies.

10030003.name: Command: Predator's Eye
10030003.desc: A predator's eyes focus on the prey.

10030004.name: Perfect Shot
10030004.desc: Catch your enemies square in your sights.

10030005.name: Spirit of Elluel
10030005.desc: Summon forth the spirits of Elluel to devastate your foes.

10030006.name: Inhuman Speed
10030006.desc: Causes you to attack so quickly you produce afterimages.

10030007.name: Split Shot
10030007.desc: Magically enchants your arrows to explode as they approach the enemy, releasing countless more arrows.

10030008.name: Merciless Winds
10030008.desc: Calls upon the Spirit of Wind to conjure deadly homing projectiles that track down your foes.

10030009.name: Sylvidia's Flight
10030009.desc: Sylvidia, the majestic queen of unicorns swiftly charges at the enemy.

10030010.name: Wild Arrow Blast: Overdrive
10030010.desc: Your crossbow uses Resistance technology to maximize its firepower.

10030012.name: Quiver Barrage
10030012.desc: Use every type of arrowhead at once, including a special flaming arrowhead that explodes when it hits an enemy.

10030013.name: Surge Bolt
10030013.desc: Focus your mind and deploy a powerful spirit arrow.

10030014.name: Gale Barrier
10030014.desc: Activate a wind barrier around yourself that will both defend you and decimate your enemies.

10030015.name: Irkalla's Wrath
10030015.desc: Deal deadly consecutive attacks against your enemies, so they can experience the full wrath of the spirits.

10030016.name: Primal Bloom
10030016.desc: Release a blast of nature power in complete resonance with Ashlii.

10030017.name: Nova Blast
10030017.desc: Use the entire Relic Gauge contents to fire a powerful arrow that damages everything in its path.

10030018.name: Raven Tempest
10030018.desc: Use the power of the Relic to summon the true form of the Shadow Raven for ultimate destruction.

10030019.name: Obsidian Barrier
10030019.desc: Project the relic's power as a shield to defend yourself and your party members.

10030020.name: Silhouette Mirage
10030020.desc: Evade enemy attacks by moving fast enough to create illusory doubles of yourself.

10030021.name: Repeating Crossbow Cartridge
10030021.desc: Use a special cartridge that allows you to fire multiple arrows at once.

10030022.name: Relic Unbound
10030022.desc: Unleash the relic's full force and send it on the offensive.

10030023.name: Vortex Sphere
10030023.desc: Condense powerful winds into a sphere, then launch it in a slow, straight line.

10030024.name: Royal Knights
10030024.desc: Summon the honorable Royal Knights, who protect the Ruler of the Elves.

10030025.name: Overbite
10030025.desc: Roar with the wild rage accumulated by Another Bite.

10030026.name: Dragon Burst
10030026.desc: Channel your intrinsic power through the Whispershot, then blast it forward.

10030027.name: Fatal Blitz
10030027.desc: Move rapidly, dealing fatal consecutive blows to the front.

10030028.name: Thanatos Descent
10030028.desc: Malice and death descend to the ground as you unite in spirit with Satiras the Devil Dragon.

10030029.name: Grip of Agony
10030029.desc: Offer the enemy's agony to Satiras the Devil Dragon.

10040000.name: Venom Burst
10040000.desc: Poison your weapon to deal damage over time to enemies.

10040013.name: Last Resort
10040013.desc: Vow to attack the enemy until death.

10040001.name: Throwing Star Barrage
10040001.desc: Temporarily grants your throwing skills extra spread.

10040002.name: Shadow Assault
10040002.desc: Instantly approaches enemies to slice them down.

10040003.name: Blade Storm
10040003.desc: Storms forward, slashing enemies with techniques honed at the Secret Garden.

10040004.name: Omega Blaster
10040004.desc: Fire a powerful beam of energy.

10040005.name: Shadow Spear
10040005.desc: Gathers shadows on the ground to form a spear that pierces enemies.

10040006.name: Luck of the Draw
10040006.desc: Throws a flurry of cards, stopping to reveal the last one. Will luck be on your side?

10040007.name: Shurrikane
10040007.desc: Throws a massive shuriken said to be used by the thieves of old.

10040008.name: Trickblade
10040008.desc: Get behind the enemy injured by the Assassinate attack, and then you can deal your fatal blow!

10040009.name: Blades of Destiny
10040009.desc: Decide the fate of your opponents with a blinding flurry of blades.

10040010.name: Greater Dark Servant
10040010.desc: Summon a shadow that mimics its summoner.

10040011.name: Ace in the Hole
10040011.desc: Throw a razor-sharp card infused with incredible power that ricochets dangerously.

10040012.name: Core Overload
10040012.desc: Overloads your energy core, producing power in excess of your maximum storage capacity.

10040014.name: Apocalypse Cannon
10040014.desc: Summons a cannon that is the ingenious combination of an ancient Nova weapon and a Blue Dragon Cannon, merged together with Shadowdealer skill. It draws energy from its surroundings, then condenses that energy and fires it. It is not directly operational, and so is not included in the Weapon Variety Buff stacks.

10040015.name: Chain Arts: Void Strike
10040015.desc: It can bind space itself! The chains become one big clump and thrash wildly about within the bound space. All attacks that use summoned weapons in this bound space are affected by the chains.

10040016.name: Dark Lord's Omen
10040016.desc: Unleash the power of the Dark Lord's insight.

10040017.name: Sonic Blow
10040017.desc: Move faster than the speed of sound, dealing consecutive attacks along the way.

10040018.name: Blade Tornado
10040018.desc: Spin as fast as a tornado and create a black typhoon that shoots forward to damage your enemies.

10040019.name: Shadow Bite
10040019.desc: Make your enemies's shadows attack them and strip them of their power.

10040020.name: Phantom's Mark
10040020.desc: Brand the enemy with Phantom's mark.

10040021.name: Hypogram Field: Fusion
10040021.desc: Deploys the latest Hypogram Field that combines every Hypogram feature.

10040022.name: Chain Arts: Maelstrom
10040022.desc: Whip chains at high speed to create a maelstrom that will strike fear into the hearts of all your enemies.

10040023.name: Sage: Clone Rampage
10040023.desc: Draws out the full power of Talisman: Clone, raining a barrage of clones on enemies.

10040024.name: Scroll: Tiger of Songyu
10040024.desc: Summons the guardian of Mt. Songyu, a giant tiger spirit.

10040025.name: Sage: Wrath of Gods
10040025.desc: Calls upon the gods of an unknown place and time.

10040026.name: Throw Blasting
10040026.desc: Throw shurikens with explosive charms attached.

10040027.name: Slash Shadow Formation
10040027.desc: Team up with dark allies in a special formation to perform a joint attack.

10040028.name: Haunted Edge
10040028.desc: The malevolent spirit imbued in the blade attacks the enemy on their own.

10040029.name: Rapid Throw
10040029.desc: Toss countless throwing stars at blinding speed.

10040030.name: Rift Break
10040030.desc: Instantly cleave through the enemy's weak points and destroy them.

10040031.name: Photon Ray
10040031.desc: Lock onto enemies and destroy them with photonic cannon blasts.

10040032.name: Muscle Memory Finale
10040032.desc: Push the limits of weapon mastery to inflict additional hits with even greater power.

10040033.name: Sage: Three Paths Apparition
10040033.desc: Through enlightenment, create a special clone capable of attribute combos.

10040035.name: Void Burst
10040035.desc: Becomes the wind of vengeance and annihilates all enemies passing by.

10040037.name: Resonate: Ultimatum
10040037.desc: Summons a chakri that has amplified magic power to the max.

10050000.name: Loaded Dice
10050000.desc: Adds an extra die to Roll of the Dice and allows you to choose a number.

10050017.name: Overdrive
10050017.desc: Puts weapons into overdrive for a brief time of greater attack power.

10050001.name: Lightning Form
10050001.desc: Unleash your rage and soar to new heights of power.

10050002.name: Bullet Barrage
10050002.desc: Wildly fires your gun in all directions.

10050003.name: Lightning Cascade
10050003.desc: Call upon the full power of the storm to annihilate your enemies with a chain of lightning.

10050004.name: Cannon of Mass Destruction
10050004.desc: Fire a gigantic rocket from your cannon.

10050005.name: Doomsday Device
10050005.desc: Summons an diabolical death machine to annihilate your opponents.

10050006.name: Fox God Flash
10050006.desc: Incarnates an Avatar of the Fox God, vanquishing darkness with divine light.

10050007.name: Sparkle Burst
10050007.desc: Gathers the love of all for the idol of the battlefield, amplifying the energy of the relic and detonating it.

10050009.name: Lord of the Deep
10050009.desc: Calls upon the spirit of the dreaded sea serpent that slumbers beneath the savage tides to wrap yourself in a deadly barrier that maims all foes who venture near.

10050010.name: Target Lock
10050010.desc: Locks onto your targets, then draws your gun and fires upon them in rapid succession.

10050011.name: ICBM
10050011.desc: Shoots a ballistic missile in a curved trajectory to attack enemies in a wide range.

10050012.name: Shark Torpedo
10050012.desc: Summons a deadly shark spirit that flies forward, attacking your foes.

10050013.name: Spiritgate
10050013.desc: Open the spirit door to release a torrent of dark spirits to attack enemies.

10050014.name: Mobile Missile Battery
10050014.desc: Launches a missile battery that fires a barrage of micro-missiles.

10050015.name: Superstar Spotlight
10050015.desc: Sets up a series of mobile spotlights that empower superstars and damage enemies.

10050018.name: Abyssal Recall

30000000.name: Frenzied Strength I
30000000.desc: Increases damage by 20% for 10 seconds when 120 enemies are defeated / Activates once every 60 seconds / Count is reset when you fail to defeat enough enemies within 30 seconds

30000001.name: Lethal Strike I
30000001.desc: Increases Critical Rate by 100% for 10 seconds on every 1000th attack / Activates once every 60 seconds / Count is reset when you fail to land enough attacks within 30 seconds

30000006.name: Character Building I
30000006.desc: Increases EXP by 50% for 20 seconds after being attacked 100 times / Activates once every 30 seconds / If you are not attacked 100 times in 30 seconds, the count will reset

30000008.name: Boss Slayer I
30000008.desc: Grants a 0.1% chance when attacking to increase Boss Damage by 50% for 10 seconds / Activates once every 30 seconds

30000009.name: Boss Slayer II
30000009.desc: Increases Boss Damage by 50% for 10 seconds when a skill is used / Activates once every 120 seconds

30000010.name: Boss Slayer III
30000010.desc: Increases Boss Damage by 50% for 10 seconds when 30 enemies are defeated / Activates once every 10 seconds / Count is reset when you fail to defeat enough enemies within 30 seconds

30000002.name: Defense Smash I
30000002.desc: Increases Ignore Defense by 100% for 10 seconds when attacking the same enemy 800 times (once per skill use) / Activates once every 60 seconds / Count is reset when you fail to land enough attacks within 30 seconds

30000012.name: Defense Smash II
30000012.desc: Grants Ignore Enemy 100% for 10 seconds when a skill is used every 120 seconds

30000014.name: Comeback
30000014.desc: Upon death, reduces skill cooldowns by 30% (excludes skills unaffected by cooldown reductions or resets) / Activates once per 60 sec

30000015.name: Relentless Attack
30000015.desc: Reduces cooldowns for all skills by 20% (excluding skills not affected by cooldown reduction), when Combo Kills are multiples of 50 / Activates once every 75 seconds / Count is reset when you fail to get a Combo Kill within 10 seconds

30000016.name: Auto Recovery
30000016.desc: Fully recovers HP every 30 seconds when a skill is used.

30000017.name: Withstand
30000017.desc: Grants invincibility for 10 seconds after being attacked 100 times / Activates once every 30 seconds / If you are not attacked 100 times in 30 seconds, the count will reset

30000018.name: Withstand II
30000018.desc: Reduces cooldowns for all skills by 20% (excluding skills not affected by cooldown reduction), after being attacked 100 times / Activates once every 60 seconds / If you are not attacked 100 times in 60 seconds, the count will reset

30000019.name: Just One I
30000019.desc: Increases Critical Rate by 100% for 10 seconds when attacking the same enemy 800 times (once per skill use) / Activates once every 60 seconds / Count is reset when you fail to land enough attacks within 30 seconds

30000021.name: Rune-EXP I
30000021.desc: Increases EXP by 50% for 20 seconds every time a rune is activated

30000022.name: Grit I
30000022.desc: Reduces remaining cooldown of all skills by 25% after being attacked 100 times / Activates once every 30 seconds / If you are not attacked 100 times in 30 seconds, the count will reset

30000023.name: Fatal Strike I
30000023.desc: Increases damage by 100% for 4 seconds when attacking, every 30 seconds

30000024.name: Counterattack I
30000024.desc: Increases damage by 100% for 2 seconds on every 20th hit / Activates once every 30 seconds / Count is reset when you fail to get enough hits within 30 seconds

40000000.name: Concentrated Experience
40000000.desc: A Node that contains a high concentration of Erda. It can be used to enhance Nodes. Cannot be dismantled or crafted.

20050049.desc: Boosts Divine Art: Erupting Flame/Divine Art: Righteous Thunder.

20050050.desc: Boosts Divine Art: Swirling Tide/Divine Art: Tearing Wind.

10010012.name: Shogetsu Form
10010012.desc: Shogetsu Akatsuki Style Divine Technique.\r\nWitness the new moon seen only by the masters of Akatsuki Style. Your swordsmanship illuminates the endless night.

10020009.name: [Spirit] Hakumenkonmou Juubi
10020009.desc: The strength of your bond with Haku temporarily awakens her as a transcendental spirit.

10050008.name: Gravity Crush
10050008.desc: A powerful singularity draws in enemies. Detonating the singularity inflicts significant damage over a large distance, based on the damage dealt while the target was affected by the singularity. Unaffected by attack reflection.

10020010.name: Champ Charge
10020010.desc: The Beast Tamer's animal friends join forces to attack the enemy. Pressing the skill button repeatedly will perform a joint attack, with the last animal friend unleashing a powerful special attack. You can use the directional keys during the skill to determine which animal will inflict the final strike.

10000021.name: Twilight Bloom
10000021.desc: Greatly boosts the blessing of the Five Planets when it erupts in full bloom and greatly increases your stats temporarily.

10010024.name: [Shinsoku] Crashing Tide
10010024.desc: Shinsoku Akatsuki Style Secret Technique.\r\nArc your blade in a circle around you within the span of a single breath.

10020019.name: [Spirit] Unleash the Radiant Flame
10020019.desc: Unleash a portion of #cOni's# power, igniting a spark of madness and allowing her to go berserk. On your order, she will light the radiant flame.

10020020.name: Cub Cavalry
10020020.desc: Calls a herd of critter cubs to your aid. Unaffected by attack reflection.

10050016.name: Suborbital Strike
10050016.desc: Calls down drones to blast your enemies with a graviton beam. Swap modes by pressing the skill key again after casting. Unaffected by attack reflection.

10010037.name: [Shinsoku] Light Cutter
10010037.desc: Shinsoku Akatsuki Style Secret Technique.\r\nSprint forward with blinding speed and cut your foes.\n#cMultiple uses can be prepared in advance.

10020033.name: [Spirit] Unleash Black-Winged Destruction
10020033.desc: Unleash a portion of Tengu's power for a single black-feathered strike that pierces the heavens. On your order, she will rain down black-winged destruction.

10020034.name: Aerial Relief
10020034.desc: Your animal friends zoom in on an airplane and attack the enemy mercilessly. Unaffected by attack reflection.

10050028.name: Allied Fury
10050028.desc: Summon fellow bounty hunters who teleport between monsters, attack enemies, and use an airship to deliver a finishing blow to your foes. Unaffected by attack reflection.

10000030.name: Princess Sakuno's Blessing
10000030.desc: The blessing of Princess Sakuno briefly unlocks your maximum potential.

10010053.name: [Battou] Wailing Heavens
10010053.desc: Battou Akatsuki Style Secret Technique.\r\nInstantly draw your blade, unleashing a strike brilliant enough to light up the night.

10020044.name: [Spirit] Unleash Soul-Searing Venom
10020044.desc: Unleash a portion of Orochi's power to create venom so strong it can sear the soul itself. On your order, she will coat her fangs in soul-searing venom.

10020045.name: The Greatest Show on Maple World Is Coming!
10020045.desc: Come one, come all! Witness the greatest show this world has ever seen. You won't believe it, and you'll never forget it! Hey guys...? Boss...? Well, it looks like Arby is having fun, at least. What about you, Eka? Fort, that fool... Why is he working so hard? *Sigh*...\nAdditional Attack will be applied while the circus is maintained, and additional attacks will be unaffected by attack reflection.

10050037.name: Anti-Gravity Cycle SFF-X Summon
10050037.desc: Mount the Anti-Gravity Cycle SFF-X. While mounted, you'll be considered flying, meaning you won't be able to use certain skills.

10020050.name: Beast's Rage
10020050.desc: Paeon ferociously combats the enemies of the forest, attacking consecutively without mercy.

10020051.name: Beak Strike
10020051.desc: Calls forth Penni's full potential to greatly enhance Peck.

10020052.name: [Focus] Awaken
10020052.desc: Borrows nature's might to increase your attack significantly, and awaken the potential of the current Focal Target.

10020053.name: Nature's Grace
10020053.desc: The merciful blessings of nature amplify your recovery abilities.\nYour excess healing given to party members now becomes a shield.

10000035.name: Power of Destiny
10000035.desc: Draws upon the selected Power of Destiny.

Cannot be extended.

This effect can trigger 30 seconds after the Mapae Special Node is equipped.
Cannot be extended.

30000029.name: Inspector Power II
30000029.desc:

Cannot be extended.

Cannot be extended.

10020055.name: Stellar XI - Sirius
10020055.desc: Complete the Sirius fusion to temporarily summon Sirius as a wolf.

10020056.name: Stellar XII - Sadalsuud
10020056.desc: Complete the Sadalsuud fusion to summon Sadalsuud as an hourglass.

10020057.name: Savior's Circle
10020057.desc: Combines the power of the twelve constellations to create a strength greater than any star alone.

10050038.name: Soul Art: Beneath Heaven
10050038.desc: Calls upon the Divine Fist to empower a punch with explosive divine qi.

10050039.name: Soul Art: The Conquered Self
10050039.desc: Reaches the Conquered Self by combining the power of Wu Shen and Qi Projection.

10050040.name: Soul Art: The Opened Gate
10050040.desc: Invokes the power of Wu Shen temporarily to maximize fighting prowess.

10050041.name: Divine Art: Crashing Earth
10050041.desc: Strikes the earth and explodes with the power of the Divine Fist.

30000031.name: Roro Power I
30000031.desc:

This effect can trigger for 30 seconds after the Roro Special Node is equipped.
Cannot be extended.

30000032.name: Roro Power II
30000032.desc:
Every 60 seconds, increases Mesos Obtained by 10% for 20 seconds when attacking.

This effect can trigger for 30 seconds after the Roro Special Node is equipped.
Cannot be extended.

30000033.name: Roro Power III
30000033.desc:
Every 60 seconds, increases EXP Obtained by 30% for 20 seconds when attacking.

This effect can trigger for 30 seconds after the Roro Special Node is equipped.
Cannot be extended.

10000038.name: Tree of Stars
10000038.desc: Communes with the Star Garden to draw forth the power of the Star Flowers.
